input.feature: Migrate user service from REST to GraphQL
tasks: T1: Define GraphQL schema and type definitions
T2: Implement GraphQL resolvers mapping to existing data model
T3: Update data access layer for GraphQL query patterns
T4: Build integration layer between GraphQL and existing REST consumers
T5: Write resolver unit tests
T6: Write end-to-end integration tests for GraphQL queries and mutations
